text: 🇮🇶 The Iraqi resistance group Saraya Awliya al-Dam (SAD) warned the US and the Israeli regime on Monday evening that any renewed aggression against Iran would be met with even harsher resistance operations than before. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇶 伊拉克抵抗组织“血之守护者旅”（SAD）周一晚间警告美国和以色列政权，任何针对伊朗的再次侵略都将遭到比以往更严厉的抵抗行动。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump earlier today: "The DEAL that we are making with Iran will be FAR BETTER than the JCPOA, commonly referred to as “The Iran Nuclear Deal,” penned by Barack Hussein Obama and Sleepy Joe Biden, one of the Worst Deals ever made having to do with the Security of our Country. It was a guaranteed Road to a Nuclear Weapon, which will not, and cannot, happen with the Deal we’re working on. They actually gave $1.7 Billion Dollars in “GREEN” Cash, loaded into a Boeing 757, and flown to Iran for Iranian leadership to spend anyway they saw fit. He emptied out all of the Cash from Banks in D.C., Virginia, and Maryland. Those Bankers said they’ve never seen anything like it before. In addition, Hundreds of Billions of Dollars was paid to Iran. If I did not terminate that “Deal,” Nuclear Weapons would have been used on Israel, and all over the Middle East, including our cherished U.S. Military Bases. The Fake News, like Lightweight Washington Post “Journalist” David Ignatius, loves to talk about the JCPOA, knowing that it was DANGEROUS, and a Complete Embarrassment to our Country. If a Deal happens under “TRUMP,” it will guarantee Peace, Security, and Safety, not only for Israel and the Middle East, but for Europe, America, and everywhere else. It will be something that the entire World will be proud of, instead of the years of Embarrassment and Humiliation that we have been forced to suffer due to incompetent and cowardly leadership! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普今日早些时候：“我们正在与伊朗达成的协议将远好于《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA），即通常所说的‘伊朗核协议’。该协议由巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马和瞌睡乔·拜登签署，是涉及我国安全的最糟糕的协议之一。它是一条通往核武器的保证之路，而我们正在制定的协议绝不会、也不可能发生这种情况。他们实际上给了17亿美元的‘绿色’现金，装进波音757飞机，飞往伊朗，供伊朗领导层随意挥霍。他掏空了华盛顿特区、弗吉尼亚州和马里兰州银行里的所有现金。那些银行家说他们以前从未见过这样的事情。此外，还向伊朗支付了数千亿美元。如果我没有终止那个‘协议’，核武器就会被用于以色列以及整个中东，包括我们珍视的美国军事基地。像轻量级的《华盛顿邮报》‘记者’大卫·伊格内修斯这样的假新闻媒体，喜欢谈论JCPOA，却明知它很危险，是对我国的彻底羞辱。如果协议在‘特朗普’领导下达成，它将保证和平、安全和保障，不仅是对以色列和中东，对欧洲、美国以及其他任何地方也是如此。这将是全世界都会引以为豪的事情，而不是我们因无能和懦弱的领导而被迫忍受多年的尴尬和羞辱！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump earlier today: "The Democrats are doing everything possible to hurt the very strong position we are in with respect to Iran. Despite World War I lasting 4 years, 3 months, and 14 days, World War II lasting 6 years and 1 day, the Korean War lasting 3 years, 1 month, and 2 days, the Vietnam War lasting 19 years, 5 months, and 29 days, and Iraq lasting 8 years, 8 months, and 28 days, they like to say that I promised 6 weeks to defeat Iran, and actually, from the Military standpoint, it was far faster than that, but I’m not going to let them rush the United States into making a Deal that is not as good as it could have been. I read the Fake News saying that I am under “pressure” to make a Deal. THIS IS NOT TRUE! I am under no pressure whatsoever, although, it will all happen, relatively quickly! Time is not my adversary, the only thing that matters is that we finally, after 47 years, straighten out the MESS that other Presidents let happen because they didn’t have the Courage or Foresight to do what had to be done with respect to Iran. We’re in it, and it will be done RIGHT, and we won’t let the Weak and Pathetic Democrats, TRAITORS ALL, who for years have been talking about the Dangers of Iran, and that something has to be done, but now, since I’m the one doing it, belittle the accomplishments of our Military and the Trump Administration. This is being perfectly executed, on the scale of Venezuela, just a bigger, more complex operation. The result will be the same. In my First Term, I built the Greatest Military our Country has ever seen, including adding Space Force. In my Second Term, I am properly and judiciously using our Military to solve problems left to us by others of far less understanding or competence. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普今日早些时候：“民主党人正在尽一切可能破坏我们在伊朗问题上所处的非常有利的地位。尽管第一次世界大战持续了4年3个月14天，第二次世界大战持续了6年1天，朝鲜战争持续了3年1个月2天，越南战争持续了19年5个月29天，伊拉克战争持续了8年8个月28天，他们却喜欢说我承诺6周内击败伊朗，实际上，从军事角度来看，这比那快得多，但我不会让他们催促美国达成一份不如预期的协议。我读到假新闻说我因达成协议而承受‘压力’。这不是真的！我没有任何压力，尽管这一切都会相对较快地发生！时间不是我的对手，唯一重要的是，在47年后，我们终于理顺了其他总统因缺乏勇气或远见而让其发生的烂摊子。我们身处其中，它会被正确地完成，我们不会让那些软弱可悲的民主党人——全是叛徒——得逞。他们多年来一直在谈论伊朗的危险，说必须采取行动，但现在，因为是我在做这件事，他们就贬低我们军队和特朗普政府的成就。这正在完美执行，规模堪比委内瑞拉，只是一个更大、更复杂的操作。结果将是一样的。在我的第一个任期内，我建立了我国有史以来最强大的军队，包括增加了太空军。在我的第二个任期内，我正在恰当且明智地利用我们的军队来解决那些理解力或能力远不如我的人留下的问题。让美国再次伟大！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @Daractenus : A very powerful explosion has just occurred at one of Bucharest's main thermal power plants. Over 30 tonnes of fuel at the site have ignited. No further details are available at the moment. https://twitter.com/Daractenus/status/2046342905736921471/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @Daractenus ：布加勒斯特主要热电厂之一刚刚发生了一次威力巨大的爆炸。现场超过30吨燃料被点燃。目前没有更多细节。https://twitter.com/Daractenus/status/2046342905736921471/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A 10,000 kW electrical transformer containing about 30 tons of oil exploded at the West District Heating Plant (CET) in Bucharest, Romania, local media report. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046355076038414480/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据当地媒体报道，罗马尼亚布加勒斯特西区供热厂（CET）发生了一台含有约30吨油的10,000千瓦电力变压器爆炸事件。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046355076038414480/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @visionergeo : ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump states that the ceasefire agreement will no longer be extended, and if the agreement is not reached, then the bombing will begin. According to Trump, he does not know whether the Iranian delegation will go to Pakistan for negotiations. For reference, according to Trump, the American delegation has already traveled to Pakistan, but the media reports that Vance, Witkoff, and Kushner will travel to Islamabad tomorrow. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @visionergeo ：‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 快讯 | 唐纳德·特朗普表示停火协议将不再延长，如果达不成协议，轰炸就开始。据特朗普称，他不知道伊朗代表团是否会前往巴基斯坦进行谈判。作为参考，据特朗普称，美国代表团已经前往巴基斯坦，但媒体报道称万斯、威特科夫和库什纳将于明天前往伊斯兰堡。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Visioner RT @visionergeo : 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Kan: A senior Israeli official said the United States and Iran are not close to an agreement, and that Israel is ready to return to war in Iran with American approval. “We are all waiting for Trump, but the sides are not close to agreement,” the official said. U.S. President Trump told PBS that a deal would be signed today in Pakistan, but warned that if the ceasefire expires tomorrow evening without an agreement, “many bombs will be launched.” Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said Americans seek Iranian submission, but Iran does not surrender to force. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @visionergeo ：🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | Kan：一位以色列高级官员表示，美国和伊朗并未接近达成协议，以色列已准备好在获得美国批准的情况下重返伊朗战场。“我们都在等待特朗普，但双方并未接近达成协议，”该官员说。美国总统特朗普告诉PBS，协议将于今天在巴基斯坦签署，但警告称，如果停火协议在明天傍晚到期而未达成协议，“将发射许多炸弹”。伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬表示，美国人寻求伊朗屈服，但伊朗不会向武力投降。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Visioner RT @visionergeo : ‼️ ‼️ 🇩🇪 BREAKING | WSJ: Germany is redirecting parts of its struggling industrial base—especially automotive suppliers—into defense production. Facing stagnation and rising competition (notably from China), Berlin is pushing factories, workers, and expertise toward weapons manufacturing. Firms like Rheinmetall are expanding rapidly, and auto suppliers are partnering on drones, ammunition, and military systems. The goal is to turn economic weakness into strength by making Germany a central hub for Europe’s rearmament. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @visionergeo ：‼️ ‼️ 🇩🇪 快讯 | 《华尔街日报》：德国正在将其陷入困境的工业基础——尤其是汽车供应商——转向国防生产。面对停滞和日益激烈的竞争（特别是来自中国），柏林正在推动工厂、工人和专业知识转向武器制造。莱茵金属等公司正在迅速扩张，汽车供应商也在无人机、弹药和军事系统方面进行合作。目标是通过使德国成为欧洲重整军备的中心枢纽，将经济弱点转化为优势。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: 🇸🇦 🇺🇸 Jared Kushner on Saudi payroll? — At least $2B — Sen Jon Ossoff 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇸🇦 🇺🇸 贾里德·库什纳在沙特的工资单上？——至少20亿美元——参议员乔恩·奥索夫 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 “We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats” — Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. “We have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield.” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们不接受在威胁阴影下的谈判”——伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫。“我们已准备好在战场上亮出新牌。” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺CNN: The senior U.S. State Department delegation discussed bringing Starlink satellite internet to Cuba during their meeting with senior Cuban officials recently. The U.S. also demanded that the Cuban government release political prisoners and commit…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 Fox: The U.S. delegation met with deceased Cuban leader Castro's brother Raul Castro during their visit. The correspondent makes a mistake and says Fidel's grandson, who is nowhere near 94, and likely meant to say Raul, who is 94 and has been in direct communication with Secretary of State Rubio according to previous reporting. "A senior official confirms to us tonight that that delegation met with Fidel Castro's grandson who is 94 years old while on the ground in Havana. They also tell us, the delegation made demands of Havana, including major reforms like opening up the Internet and making sure going forward that they agree to release at least some political prisoners, Brett." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺CNN：美国国务院高级代表团在最近与古巴高级官员的会晤中，讨论了将星链卫星互联网引入古巴的问题。美国还要求古巴政府释放政治犯并承诺……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 福克斯新闻：美国代表团在访问期间会见了已故古巴领导人卡斯特罗的兄弟劳尔·卡斯特罗。记者犯了一个错误，说是菲德尔的孙子，但他根本不到94岁，很可能指的是94岁的劳尔，据之前的报道，他一直与国务卿卢比奥保持直接联系。“一位高级官员今晚向我们证实，该代表团在哈瓦那期间会见了94岁的菲德尔·卡斯特罗的孙子。他们还告诉我们，代表团向哈瓦那提出了要求，包括进行重大改革，如开放互联网，并确保未来同意释放至少部分政治犯，布雷特。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇴 A 10,000 kW electrical transformer containing around 30 tons of oil exploded at the West District Heating Plant in Bucharest. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇴 布加勒斯特西区供热厂发生爆炸，一台含有约30吨油的10,000千瓦电力变压器爆炸。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺NYT: A senior delegation from the US visited Cuba last week to discuss a deal to address the humanitarian crisis on the island. The delegation warned Cuba's government that it had a narrow window of time to make economic and political changes demanded…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 CNN: The senior U.S. State Department delegation discussed bringing Starlink satellite internet to Cuba during their meeting with senior Cuban officials recently. The U.S. also demanded that the Cuban government release political prisoners and commit to reforms to increase political freedoms. A State Department also notified Cuban officials about their concern of foreing intelligence, military, and terror groups operating on the island with the permission of the Cuban government. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺《纽约时报》：美国高级代表团上周访问了古巴，讨论旨在解决该岛人道主义危机的协议。代表团警告古巴政府，他们做出经济和政治变革要求的时间窗口很窄……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 CNN：美国国务院高级代表团在最近与古巴高级官员的会晤中，讨论了将星链（Starlink）卫星互联网引入古巴的问题。美国还要求古巴政府释放政治犯，并承诺进行改革以增加政治自由。美国国务院还通知古巴官员，他们对外国情报机构、军事组织和恐怖组织在古巴政府许可下在该岛活动表示关切。 @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - U.S. delegation met with Fidel Castro's grandson, who is 94 years old, while on the ground in Havana. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046352811986743653/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 美国代表团在哈瓦那期间会见了94岁的菲德尔·卡斯特罗的孙子。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046352811986743653/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Does anyone know if Vance left to Pakistan? It’s about a 16 hour flight with a 9 hour time difference, so if he leaves now, the earliest arrival in Islamabad would be around 22:00 (10PM) local time Tuesday night. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 有人知道万斯（Vance）是否已经出发前往巴基斯坦了吗？飞行时间大约16小时，时差9小时，所以如果他现在出发，最早到达伊斯兰堡的时间大约是当地时间周二晚上22:00（晚上10点）。推文

text: Open Source Intel Only option is 1, and if 1 doesn’t work it’s 4. All other options are null and void WSJ: As the U.S. prepares for another round of peace talks with Iran in Pakistan this week, President Trump faces five broad options: 1. Stick to his guns 2. Buy some time 3. Compromise 4. Restart war 5. Walk Away - Faytuks Network tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 唯一的选择是1，如果1行不通，那就是4。所有其他选项都无效。《华尔街日报》：随着美国准备本周在巴基斯坦与伊朗进行新一轮和平谈判，特朗普总统面临五个广泛的选择：1. 坚持立场 2. 争取时间 3. 妥协 4. 重启战争 5. 退出 - Faytuks Network 推文

text: WarMonitor An Iranian professor and commentator says JD Vance should leave, claiming Tehran won’t negotiate under what he calls “delusional” demands and a U.S. naval blockade. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046349480195203258/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位伊朗教授兼评论员表示，JD·万斯应该离开，并声称德黑兰不会在所谓的“妄想”要求和美国海军封锁下进行谈判。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046349480195203258/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW: Trump on Iran: “I am winning by a lot, things are going very well.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 此刻：特朗普谈伊朗：“我赢了很多，事情进展非常顺利。”推文

text: Open Source Intel The “we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield” got me 😂 Iran lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in a message to President Trump: "Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to turn this negotiation table into a table of surrender in his own imagination or to justify renewed warmongering. We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel “我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌”这句话让我笑了 😂 伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）在给特朗普总统的信息中称：“特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图在他自己的想象中将这张谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争辩护。我们不接受在威胁阴影下进行谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Is he saying Iran wants a deal but “we can’t be seen wanting one.” Am I reading this right? Iran lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in a message to President Trump: "Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to turn this negotiation table into a table of surrender in his own imagination or to justify renewed warmongering. We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 他是在说伊朗想要达成协议，但“我们不能表现出想要协议的样子”吗？我理解对了吗？伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫在给特朗普总统的信息中称：“特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图在他自己的想象中将这张谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争辩护。我们不接受在威胁阴影下进行谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: WarMonitor The CEO of one of the world’s largest oil traders warns prices could stay volatile for months due to Middle East instability. Airlines are already cutting routes as fuel costs spike. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046348189062791571/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 全球最大的石油贸易商之一的首席执行官警告称，由于中东局势不稳定，油价可能会在数月内保持波动。随着燃料成本飙升，航空公司已经在削减航线。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046348189062791571/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel It’s confirmed: Lori Chavez-DeRemer has stepped down as U.S. Labor Secretary U.S. Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer has stepped down from her post, with a formal announcement expected shortly -NOTUS https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046333856211513412/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 已确认：洛里·查韦斯-德雷默（Lori Chavez-DeRemer）已辞去美国劳工部长职务。美国劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默已辞去职务，预计很快会有正式公告 - NOTUS https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046333856211513412/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Regime English speaking mouthpiece Mohammad Marandi: “I advise US Vice President JD Vance to unpack his suitcases and not to head to Islamabad. With the current delusional and unrealistic demands and the continued naval blockade, no one in Tehran is willing to negotiate with him” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 政权讲英语的喉舌穆罕默德·马兰迪（Mohammad Marandi）：“我建议美国副总统JD·万斯打开行李箱，不要前往伊斯兰堡。在当前妄想和不切实际的要求以及持续的海军封锁下，德黑兰没有人愿意与他谈判。”推文

text: Faytuks News No reports yet that the Americans or Iranians have departed for talks in Islamabad tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 尚未有报道称美国人或伊朗人已出发前往伊斯兰堡进行会谈 推文

text: WarMonitor Sen. Dick Durbin says FBI Director Kash Patel has “proven his worst fears” since confirmation, accusing him of lacking the experience, judgment, and temperament for the job and using the FBI to serve only Trump’s interests. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 参议员迪克·德宾（Dick Durbin）表示，联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）自确认任命以来“证实了他最糟糕的担忧”，指责他缺乏担任该职位的经验、判断力和气质，并利用联邦调查局仅为特朗普的利益服务。推文

text: Open Source Intel If you are confused about what’s going on with negotiations, imagine how the Islamic regimes ‘leadership’ feels rn Complete chaos inside the IRGC tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 如果你对谈判中发生的事情感到困惑，想象一下伊斯兰政权的“领导层”现在的感受。伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）内部一片混乱 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran lead negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf in a message to President Trump: "Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to turn this negotiation table into a table of surrender in his own imagination or to justify renewed warmongering. We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗首席谈判代表穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫在给特朗普总统的信息中称：“特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图在他自己的想象中将这张谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争辩护。我们不接受在威胁阴影下进行谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇲🇽🇨🇦Mexican President Sheinbaum expressed her condolences for the shooting at Teotihuacán today where a Canadian citizen was killed. She instructed the Security Cabinet to investigate the incident and is communicating with the Canadian Embassy. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇲🇽 Footage from Teotihuacán shows man atop the pyramid firing his gun multiple times at group of people laying down. At least two people were killed, and multiple others injured. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇲🇽🇨🇦墨西哥总统辛鲍姆（Sheinbaum）对今天在特奥蒂瓦坎发生的枪击事件表示哀悼，一名加拿大公民在事件中丧生。她指示安全内阁调查此事，并正在与加拿大驻墨西哥大使馆沟通。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇲🇽 特奥蒂瓦坎的录像显示，一名男子在金字塔顶端向躺在地上的一群人多次开枪。至少有两人死亡，多人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Al-Araby: A Israeli airstrike targeted a police checkpoint northwest of Khan Yonis. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Reports that 2 died in the Israeli airstrike targeting the police checkpoint northwest of Khan Yonis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 Al-Araby：以色列空袭了汗尤尼斯西北部的一个警察检查站。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 有报道称，以色列对汗尤尼斯西北部警察检查站的空袭造成 2 人死亡。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Central Command released a video showing Marines departing from USS Tripoli by helicopter to board and seize Iranian-flagged ship Touska. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: U.S. Marines are currently searching 5,000 containers aboard the sanctioned Touska cargo ship, which sailed under an Iranian flag. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国中央司令部发布了一段视频，显示海军陆战队乘坐直升机离开的黎波里号（USS Tripoli），登船并扣押了悬挂伊朗国旗的 Touska 号货轮。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：美国海军陆战队目前正在搜查受制裁的 Touska 号货轮上的 5000 个集装箱，该船悬挂伊朗国旗航行。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 An Israeli airstrike targeted areas west of Khan Yonis the southern Gaza Strip. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Al-Araby: A Israeli airstrike targeted a police checkpoint northwest of Khan Yonis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇵🇸 以色列空袭了加沙地带南部汗尤尼斯以西的地区。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Al-Araby：以色列空袭了汗尤尼斯西北部的一个警察检查站。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 An Israeli airstrike targeted areas west of Khan Yonis the southern Gaza Strip. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列空袭了加沙地带南部汗尤尼斯以西的地区。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽 Two U.S. Embassy staff members and two Mexican security officials, including the director of the Chihuahua State Investigation Agency, were killed in a car accident while supporting joint security operations. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 Mexican President Sheinbaum was not aware of U.S. Embassy staff collaborating wih the State of Chihuahua, and her administration is asking ofr more information on the joint work between the two. "Well, first of all, we regret the death, because regardless of any situation, there is the human. And we regret this accident, that they have died, and they have all the solidarity and all the support of the government of Mexico, and we are in contact with the embassy of the United States. That is the first above all. The second is that we were not aware that there was a direct work between the state of Chihuahua and the staff of the embassy of the United States in Mexico. So we are asking for all the information from the government of Chihuahua and also from the government of the United States, and checking if there is any violation of the national security law, because it is important, it is not only... We are clear, and we have raised it like this, that there is collaboration, there is coordination, but there are no joint operations on the ground, or in the air, because there are no joint operations." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽 两名美国大使馆工作人员和两名墨西哥安全官员（包括奇瓦瓦州调查局局长）在支持联合安全行动时因车祸丧生。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 墨西哥总统辛鲍姆此前并不知晓美国大使馆工作人员与奇瓦瓦州政府的合作，她的政府正在要求获取有关双方联合工作的更多信息。“首先，我们对他们的死亡表示遗憾，因为无论情况如何，人命关天。我们对这起事故感到遗憾，对他们的离世表示哀悼，他们拥有墨西哥政府的全力声援和支持，我们正与美国大使馆保持联系。这是最重要的。其次，我们此前并不知道奇瓦瓦州与美国驻墨西哥大使馆工作人员之间存在直接工作往来。因此，我们正在向奇瓦瓦州政府和美国政府索取所有信息，并核查是否存在违反国家安全法的行为，因为这一点很重要，不仅仅是……我们很清楚，我们也已经提出，双方存在合作，存在协调，但不存在地面或空中的联合行动，因为根本没有联合行动。” @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Iran's chief negotiator Ghalibaf says the country won't negotiate under the 'shadow of threats' and Trump is trying to impose a siege so Iran can 'surrender'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗首席谈判代表卡利巴夫表示，该国不会在“威胁阴影”下进行谈判，特朗普正试图实施围困，以便让伊朗“投降”。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump tells Bloomberg it is 'highly unlikely' he will extend ceasefire with Iran. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普告诉彭博社，他“极不可能”延长与伊朗的停火协议。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran's parliament speaker and chief negotiator: "We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗议会议长兼首席谈判代表：“我们不接受在威胁阴影下进行谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新的底牌。”推文

text: WarMonitor Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer has resigned. The move comes amid a misconduct investigation involving alleged travel fraud, drinking on the job, and an inappropriate relationship with a staffer. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046340462915535222/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默（Lori Chavez-DeRemer）已辞职。此举发生在一项针对其不当行为的调查期间，涉及涉嫌差旅欺诈、工作时间饮酒以及与下属的不正当关系。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046340462915535222/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. forces patrol the Arabian Sea near M/V Touska, April 20, as the Iranian-flagged vessel's container cargo is searched after U.S. Marines boarded and seized the ship when it attempted to violate the U.S. naval blockade. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046339869195014249/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: U.S. Central Command 4月20日，美军在 M/V Touska 号附近巡逻，此前美国海军陆战队登船并扣押了这艘试图违反美国海军封锁的悬挂伊朗国旗的船只，目前正在搜查其集装箱货物。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2046339869195014249/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - U.S. Secretary of Labor, Chavez-DeRemer resigns — NBC https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046339379346411564/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 美国劳工部长查韦斯-德雷默辞职 — NBC https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046339379346411564/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from White House Director of Communications Steven Cheung, U.S. Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer will be stepping down from her role to take a position in the private sector. Deputy Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling will take over as Acting Secretary of Labor. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据白宫通讯主任史蒂文·张（Steven Cheung）发布的消息，美国劳工部长洛里·查韦斯-德雷默将卸任，转而进入私营部门工作。劳工部副部长基思·桑德林（Keith Sonderling）将接任代理劳工部长。推文

text: WarMonitor A U.S. Army Sergeant First Class with 27 years in uniform, including Afghanistan, says ICE detained his wife at an immigration appointment. She had legal protection and a work permit. “She followed the rules since day one.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046337787188683186/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名服役 27 年的美国陆军一级中士（曾参与阿富汗战争）表示，移民及海关执法局（ICE）在一次移民预约中拘留了他的妻子。她拥有合法保护和工作许可。“她从第一天起就遵守了规则。” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046337787188683186/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al Arabiya: Pakistan has asked the United States and Iran to extend the ceasefire by an additional two weeks. Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif may announce the extension tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉伯电视台：巴基斯坦已要求美国和伊朗将停火协议再延长两周。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫可能会在明天宣布延期。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf accused U.S. President Trump of trying to turn the negotiating table into a table of surrender. He reaffirmed that Iran will not accept negotiations under threats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫指责美国总统特朗普试图将谈判桌变成投降桌。他重申，伊朗不会接受在威胁下进行谈判。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 "I advise US Vice President JD Vance to unpack his suitcases and not to head to Islamabad. With the current delusional and unrealistic demands and the continued naval blockade, no one in Tehran is willing to negotiate with him." - Professor Marandi 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我建议美国副总统JD·万斯收拾好行李，不要前往伊斯兰堡。鉴于目前这种妄想且不切实际的要求以及持续的海上封锁，德黑兰没有人愿意与他谈判。”——马兰迪教授 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to turn this negotiating table— in his own imagination— into a table of surrender or to justify renewed warmongering. We do not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and in the past two weeks, we have prepared to reveal new cards on the battlefield.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图将他想象中的谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争寻找借口。我们不接受在威胁阴影下的谈判，在过去两周里，我们已经准备好在战场上亮出新牌。

text: 🇮🇷 JUST IN! Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: Trump, by imposing a siege and violating the ceasefire, seeks to transform what he imagines to be a negotiating table into a table of surrender — or to justify renewed warmongering. We will not accept negotiations under the shadow of threats, and over the past two weeks we have been preparing to play new cards on the battlefield. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 快讯！伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫：特朗普通过实施围困和违反停火协议，试图将他想象中的谈判桌变成投降桌，或者为重新挑起战争寻找借口。我们不会接受在威胁阴影下的谈判，在过去两周里，我们一直在准备在战场上打出新牌。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Times of Israel: The U.S. is expected to ask Lebanon to repeal its law criminalizing contact between Israeli and Lebanese citizens at the upcoming second round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon on Thursday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列时报：预计美国将在周四举行的以色列与黎巴嫩第二轮谈判中，要求黎巴嫩废除将以色列和黎巴嫩公民之间的接触定为犯罪的法律。 @wfwitness

text: Senator Jon Ossoff on Jared Kushner: He's on the Saudi payroll for two billion dollars. And now he's leading American diplomacy in the Middle East apparently while at the very same time asking princes and sheikhs across the Arab world to give him billions more. Can you imagine like a normal sitting US ambassador just hitting up Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman for billions of dollars? And it's not just Jared getting in on the action. A company owned in part by Eric and Don Jr has been pitching Gulf Kingdoms on its drone interceptors during this war. Never before have we seen so little effort to hide so much corruption. The Mar-a-Lago mafia has taken American corruption to spectacular new heights.
text_zh: 参议员乔恩·奥索夫谈贾里德·库什纳：他拿着沙特两十亿美元的薪水。现在他显然在领导美国在中东的外交工作，同时还在要求阿拉伯世界的王子和酋长们给他更多的数十亿美元。你能想象一个正常的美国现任大使向沙特王储穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼索要数十亿美元吗？而且不仅仅是贾里德参与其中。一家由埃里克和小唐纳德部分拥有的公司一直在向海湾王国推销其无人机拦截器。我们从未见过如此明目张胆的腐败。海湖庄园黑帮将美国的腐败提升到了一个惊人的新高度。
